nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 哥倫比亞西部山脈
nodes.summary: 哥倫比亞西部山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括Cauca guan、Short-tailed hawk、大绿金刚鹦鹉等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 金迪奥省

nodes.name: 厄瓜多尔

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-faced spinetail
nodes.summary: Red-faced spinetail（Red-faced spinetail，学名 Cranioleuca erythrops），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联11个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: griseigularis is found in extreme eastern Panama, the Western Andes of Colombia as far south as Nariño Department, the west slope of Colombia's Central Andes as far south as Quindío Department, and the Serranía de San Lucas in northern Colombia

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The nominate subspecies is found in the Andes of western Ecuador south to Azuay Province and in the coastal Cordillera de Mache. The red-faced spinetail mostly inhabits lower to mid-elevation subtropical montane forest and woodlands including mature secondary forest
